subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: The education of children is a mighty service, whereby they may be trained through divine education, and verily must their character be nurtured and refined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تربیت اطفال خدمت بزرگی است که به تربیت الهی تربیت گردد و اخلاق اطفال را باید تربیت کرد
subcodes.subjects: @education and the development of capacity, @need for an educator, @education of children; moral education, @Manifestation of God as educator
